title: senna racemosa var. racemosa
intro: Senna racemosa var. racemosa, also known as the Mexican senna, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its laxative and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Senna racemosa var. racemosa include its ability to relieve constipation, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. Senna racemosa var. racemosa can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote digestive health and alleviate pain.
